ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's affiliated institution */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is verified */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the problem */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the problem */,
  "hints" TEXT /* Hints provided to the users */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Solution to the problem */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the problem has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the problem has received */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the problem (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Run ID of the submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the code */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the code was submitted for */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the submission (e.g., Accepted, Wrong Answer) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "time" TEXT /* Execution time of the submission */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory usage of the submission */,
  "code_length" INTEGER /* Length of the submitted code */,
  "submit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was made */,
  "code" TEXT /* The actual code submitted by the user */,
  "test_case_results" TEXT /* JSON object containing results for each test case */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "retries" INTEGER /* Number of retries the user has made for this problem */,
  "submission_score" INTEGER /* Score of the submission (e.g., out of 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the test case belongs to */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data for the test case */,
  "expected_output" TEXT /* Expected output for the test case */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Whether the test case is hidden from the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the test case */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_case_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the test case in the overall problem score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "compiler_command" TEXT /* Command to compile and run the code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language was added to the system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the programming language */,
  "runtime_environment" TEXT /* Details of the runtime environment */,
  "default_code" TEXT /* Default code snippet for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's GitHub profile */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's LinkedIn profile */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the user's personal website */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements or badges earned by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether notifications are enabled */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred programming language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's preferred timezone */,
  "editor_theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme for the code editor (e.g., light, dark, solarized) */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Preferred font size for the code editor */,
  "editor_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the code editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the entry belongs to */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the entry is for */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user for the problem */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user for the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the leaderboard (e.g., overall, monthly, weekly) */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the user across all problems */,
  "total_submissions" INTEGER /* Total number of submissions made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)
